attacking_style: Explosive on steep gradients with attacks typically launched 5-7km from summit, but lacks sustained power for long-range moves. Prefers sharp accelerations that split groups rather than diesel-engine tempo riding.
team_tactics: Frequently sacrifices personal GC position for team leaders (paced Pogačar multiple times in 2023 TDF despite sitting 3rd overall). Benefits from teammate-driven tempo control on climbs but vulnerable when isolated without mountain support.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep, punchy climbs (Jebel Hafeet, Vallter) where explosive power matters. Exposed on rolling time trials beyond 15 minutes and flat ITT courses. Weight disadvantage noted on raw power climbs against heavier rivals.
vulnerability: Catastrophic pacing in time trials (collapsed second-half Vuelta 2021 ITT). Struggles with tactical positioning in crosswinds and race finales. Fades in third-week Grand Tours and vulnerable to illness after cold/wet conditions (abandoned 2019 Dauphiné from 2nd).
key_patterns: Sacrifices personal GC for team leaders repeatedly: paced Pogačar final km 2023, worked for Bernal 2021 Vuelta
Time trial weakness consistent: lost to non-climbers, crashes after strong starts beyond 15min rolling courses
Wins via late-climb acceleration 5-7km out when fresh, but initiating attacks gets countered without finish
Poor tactical positioning: caught behind crosswind splits, forced to lead out breaks despite being strongest
Third-week Grand Tour fade pattern: lost podium second-half 2021 Vuelta, dropped from top-5 2020 TDF Alps
Improved TT performance with form: 7s loss Catalunya 2021 vs 30s+ UAE Tour same year
form_trajectory: neutral: Strong 2023 domestique performances with stage win and TDF podium, but explicitly working for Pogačar rather than pursuing personal GC ambitions. 2023 Lombardia win shows maintained one-day punch but limited recent Grand Tour GC targets.
